name: MIX.R Defenses
description: System entry for Grounded 1 MIX.R, SUPER MIX.R, and late-game JavaMatic defense events. It does not describe one enemy, but the game’s main family of point-defense scenarios.
behavior: A MIX.R defense is won through wave control, lanes, and time management, not by killing the first thing you see. Many creatures ignore the duel and run straight to the objective if you give them a lane.
interactionWithPlayer: Each MIX.R has its own composition and terrain, so preparation matters as much as gear. In the JavaMatic defense, the fight stops being local and becomes multi-lane control.
interactionWithCreatures: The waves are designed to mix pressure types: fast bugs that slip through, tanks that waste your time, and ranged threats that force you to reposition.
strategy: It works best when you build funnels, keep repair materials ready, and think of the arena as lanes. Guard Dog, well-placed traps, and fast-clearing weapons usually matter more than chasing isolated targets too far from the MIX.R.
environments: Backyard MIX.R and SUPER MIX.R sites

loot.item: System entry: check the composition of the specific defense
Can contribute to unlocking or upgrading Guard Dog

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Varies by event, arena, and the creatures in each wave.

abilities.name: Defense Objective
abilities.description: If the objective falls, the event is lost even if you survive. It is not played like a traditional duel.

abilities.name: Mixed Waves
abilities.description: Each defense mixes creatures with different jobs to break simple linear defenses.

abilities.name: Active Repairs
abilities.description: Killing is not enough: repairing on time and not losing critical structure is a core part of the event.

abilities.name: Guard Dog Progress
abilities.description: Defensive event participation can unlock or advance the Guard Dog mutation.

specialTraits: Includes MIX.R, SUPER MIX.R, and the JavaMatic defense.
This is not a single creature: it summarizes objective-defense logic in G1.
Aphidex also treats it as a useful entry for tracking Guard Dog progress.
